title: achyrophorus brasiliensis
intro: Achyrophorus brasiliensis, also known as Brazilian wormwood or Achyrocline satureioides, is a plant species native to South America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Achyrophorus brasiliensis include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and treat respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of Achyrophorus brasiliensis can be consumed as a tea, made by infusing the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture, extracted with a solvent.
